chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1702 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA 7322/23 3. For hearing of main case 14-02-2024 Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner. M/s Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G and Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G a/w ASI/I.O Manzoor Bozdar. ***** Learned Additional P.G has filed statement on behalf of respondent No.5 and submits that case has been disposed of under C- class. In view of above, learned counsel for petitioner is satisfied and this petition along with listed application is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
